tasks.description: Coloring rules UI: toolbar panel with rule CRUD + step node background tint [2/2]
acceptance_criteria: Paintbrush icon button in canvas toolbar (next to Heat Map button) toggles coloring panel visibility
Coloring panel shows list of rules with: color swatch, name input, criteria_type dropdown, criteria_value dropdown/input, active toggle, delete button
Add Rule button creates a new rule via API and appends to list
Editing rule fields persists changes via PATCH API on blur/change
Deleting a rule removes it via DELETE API
Rules evaluated client-side in position order — last active matching rule wins
Step nodes show matching rule color as background tint at ~15% opacity (hex color + '26' suffix)
Steps matching no rule show default background (no tint)
Coloring applies to process canvas step nodes only (NOT journey canvas)
Rules apply in real-time as created/toggled/edited (no page reload needed)
HEX_COLOR_REGEX validation added to coloring-rules POST and PATCH routes
criteria_type enum validation added to coloring-rules POST and PATCH routes

patterns_to_follow: Heat Map toggle pattern in flow-canvas.tsx (heatMapMode state + toolbar Button variant toggle)
CommentCountsContext/TaskCountsContext pattern for passing data to nodes without prop-drilling
Existing StepNodeData interface in canvas.ts — add coloringRuleColor field
buildNodes() in flow-canvas.tsx — where to pass coloring data to step nodes
learnings_relevant: FEAT-051 POST/PATCH routes missing HEX_COLOR_REGEX color validation (STATUS.md warning)
FEAT-051 POST/PATCH routes missing criteria_type enum validation (iter 95 acceptance test)

tasks.special_instructions: Data layer already complete (iter 94): migration 019, ColoringRule/CriteriaType types in database.ts, API routes (GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE), client wrappers (fetchColoringRules, createColoringRule, updateColoringRule, deleteColoringRule). Architecture: (1) canvas-view.tsx fetches coloring rules via fetchColoringRules(workspaceId), evaluates rules against steps in position order (last active match wins), builds Map<stepId, hexColor>, passes both rules array and color map to FlowCanvas. (2) flow-canvas.tsx receives coloringRules + stepColorMap props, adds Paintbrush toolbar button (from lucide-react) that toggles coloring panel, passes coloringRuleColor to buildNodes for each step. (3) New coloring-panel.tsx renders as a Panel (from @xyflow/react) or absolute-positioned div below toolbar — shows rule list with inline editing. Takes workspaceId, rules, onRulesChange callback. (4) step-node.tsx reads coloringRuleColor from data and applies as background: `${color}26` (~15% opacity). When heatMapMode is active, heatMap takes precedence over coloring rules. (5) Add HEX_COLOR_REGEX validation (same as perspectives API: /^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$/i) to coloring-rules POST and PATCH routes. Also add VALID_CRITERIA_TYPES constant and validate criteria_type in both routes (same pattern as annotations API BUG-014 fix). Criteria type 'step_type' may not have a corresponding field on Step — support as freeform text input for now. criteria_value options: status → step status enum values; executor → executor type enum values; has_role → 'true'/'false'; maturity_below/maturity_above → number 1-5.

shared_files.note: Neither slot needs to modify shared config files. database.ts and client.ts already have coloring rule types/wrappers from iter 94.
